entries.name: Blazing Barrier
entries.desc:
Shields you in flame, absorbing 9,165 damage for 1 min.

Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take 56 Fire damage.

entries.name: Alter Time
entries.desc: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 sec. Effect negated by long distance or death.

entries.name: Ice Block
entries.desc:
Encases you in a block of ice, protecting you from all attacks and damage for 10 sec, but during that time you cannot attack, move, or cast spells.

Causes Hypothermia, preventing you from recasting Ice Block for 30 sec.

entries.name: Time Walk
entries.desc: Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.

entries.name: Temporal Realignment
entries.desc: Upon dropping below 25% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning 50% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Master of Time
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 sec.

entries.name: Winter's Protection
entries.desc: The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Frost Conditioning
entries.desc: Hypothermia's duration is reduced by 10 sec.

entries.name: Arcane Warding
entries.desc: Reduces magic damage taken by 4%.

entries.name: Inspired Intellect
entries.desc: Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

entries.name: Mirror Image
entries.desc:
Creates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 sec, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat.

Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate

entries.name: Spellsteal
entries.desc: Steals a beneficial magic effect from the target. This effect lasts a maximum of 2 min.

entries.name: Quick Witted
entries.desc: Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Dragon's Breath
entries.desc: Enemies in a 12 yd cone in front of you take 264 Fire damage and are disoriented for 4 sec. Damage will cancel the effect.

entries.name: Supernova
entries.desc: Pulses arcane energy around the target enemy or ally, dealing 169 Arcane damage to all enemies within 8 yds, and knocking them upward. A primary enemy target will take 100% increased damage.

entries.name: Remove Curse
entries.desc: Removes all Curses from a friendly target.

entries.name: Improved Conjuration
entries.desc: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Improved Spellsteal
entries.desc: Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 sec, but it now has a cooldown of 4.0 sec.

entries.name: Shimmer
entries.desc: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

entries.name: Improved Blink
entries.desc: Blink's cooldown is reduced by 2 sec.

entries.name: Improved Counterspell
entries.desc: Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Overflowing Energy
entries.desc:
Each time your Arcane Barrage fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

entries.name: Improved Remove Curse
entries.desc: Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

entries.name: Greater Invisibility
entries.desc: Makes you invisible and untargetable for 20 sec, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.

entries.name: Improved Frost Nova
entries.desc: Frost Nova duration is increased by 2 sec.

entries.name: Ice Ward
entries.desc: Frost Nova now has 2 charges.

entries.name: Captured Thoughts
entries.desc: The duration of Clearcasting is increased by 10 sec.

entries.name: Tome of Rhonin
entries.desc: Increases critical strike chance by 2%.

entries.name: Tome of Antonidas
entries.desc: Increases Haste by 2%.

entries.name: Incantation of Swiftness
entries.desc: Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Master of Escape
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 sec.

entries.name: Charm of Aegwynn
entries.desc: The critical strike damage of your spells is increased by 5%.

entries.name: Brainstorm
entries.desc: Gaining Clearcasting increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap.

entries.name: Flow of Time
entries.desc: The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 3 sec.

entries.name: Mana Confluence
entries.desc: Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Charm of Medivh
entries.desc: Your Mastery is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Permafrost Bauble
entries.desc: The cooldown of Ice Block and Ice Cold are reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Freezing Cold
entries.desc:
Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for 5 sec instead of snared.

When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by 80%, decaying over 3 sec.

entries.name: Ice Nova
entries.desc: Causes a whirl of icy wind around the enemy, dealing 547 Frost damage to the target and all other enemies within 8 yds, freezing them in place for 2 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Time Manipulation
entries.desc: The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Ring of Frost
entries.desc:
Summons a Ring of Frost for 10 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are incapacitated for 10 sec. Limit 10 targets.

When the incapacitate expires, enemies are slowed by 65% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Mass Polymorph
entries.desc:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 sec. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

entries.name: Energized Barriers
entries.desc: Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

entries.name: Mass Invisibility
entries.desc:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 sec. Taking any action will cancel the effect.

Does not affect allies in combat.

entries.name: Barrier Diffusion
entries.desc: When your Barrier is removed, reduce its cooldown by 5 sec.

entries.name: Ice Cold
entries.desc: Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by 70% for 6 sec but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.

entries.name: Spatial Manipulation
entries.desc: Blink gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Reflection
entries.desc:
After casting Blink, it is replaced with Reflection for 8 sec.

 Reflection
Teleports you back to where you last Blinked. Castable while casting and unaffected by the global cooldown.

entries.name: Improved Blazing Barrier
entries.desc: Blazing Barrier's damage is increased by 200% and it now cauterizes your wounds, healing you for 15% of the damage it absorbs.

entries.name: Pyroblast
entries.desc: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes 2,381 Fire damage.

entries.name: Fire Blast
entries.desc:
Blasts the enemy, critically striking for 776 Fire damage.

Castable while casting other spells.

entries.name: Firestarter
entries.desc: Your Fireball and Pyroblast spells always deal a critical strike when the target is above 90% health.

entries.name: Flamestrike
entries.desc:
Calls down a pillar of fire, burning all enemies within the area for 1,191 Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at a selected location.

entries.name: Flamestrike
entries.desc:
Calls down a pillar of fire on your target, burning all enemies within the area for 1,194 Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

This spell is cast at your target.

entries.name: Ignition
entries.desc:
Fire Blast now spreads 50% of your target's Ignite to 1 enemy.

Flamestrike applies 15% more Ignite.

entries.name: Combustion
entries.desc:
Engulfs you in flames for 10 sec, increasing your spells' critical strike chance by 100%.

Castable while casting other spells.

entries.name: Fuel the Fire
entries.desc:
Flamestrike has a chance equal to 100% of your spell critical strike chance to build up to a Hot Streak.

Flamestrike deals 5% increased damage for each enemy it damages, up to 25%.

entries.name: Fervent Flickering
entries.desc: Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its damage is increased by 25%.

entries.name: Cauterize
entries.desc:
Fatal damage instead brings you to 35% health and then burns you for 28% of your maximum health over 6 sec.

While burning, movement slowing effects are suppressed and your movement speed is increased by 150%.

This effect cannot occur more than once every 6 min.

entries.name: Meteor
entries.desc:
Calls down a meteor which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing 3,603 Fire damage to all enemies, and burns the ground, dealing 1,659 Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies in the area.

Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Scorch
entries.desc:
Scorches an enemy for 393 Fire damage.

When cast on a target below 30% health, Scorch is a guaranteed critical strike.

Castable while moving.

entries.name: Flame On
entries.desc: Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 2.0 sec.

entries.name: Kindling
entries.desc: Combustion's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.

entries.name: Critical Mass
entries.desc:
Your spells have a 4% increased chance to deal a critical strike.

You gain 10% more of the Critical Strike stat from all sources.

entries.name: Deep Impact
entries.desc: The enemy closest to the center of Meteor's impact takes 75% increased damage.

entries.name: Heat Shimmer
entries.desc: While Combustion is not active, damage from Ignite has a small chance to make your next Scorch instant, deal 100% increased damage, and deal damage as though your target was below 30% health.

entries.name: Scald
entries.desc:
Fireball always critically strikes enemies below 30% health.

When Fireball or Scorch damage an enemy below 30% health, Fireball deals 25% increased damage and Scorch deals 250% increased damage.

entries.name: Controlled Destruction
entries.desc: Damaging an enemy with Fireball, Pyroblast, or Flamestrike increases the damage it receives from Ignite by 0.2%. Stacks up to 50 times.

entries.name: Mote of Flame
entries.desc: All Fire damage dealt increased by 3%.

entries.name: Blast Zone
entries.desc: Meteor's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

entries.name: Conflagration
entries.desc: Fire Blast deals 158 additional Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Intensifying Flame
entries.desc: While Ignite is on 3 or fewer enemies it flares up dealing an additional 30% of its damage to affected targets.

entries.name: Spontaneous Combustion
entries.desc: Casting Combustion refreshes up to 1 charge of Fire Blast.

entries.name: Molten Fury
entries.desc: Damage dealt to targets below 30% health is increased by 15%.

entries.name: Inflame
entries.desc: Hot Streak increases the amount of Ignite damage from Pyroblast or Flamestrike by an additional 25%.

entries.name: Wildfire
entries.desc: Fire Blast damage increased by 10% and it now spreads Ignite to 1 additional target.

entries.name: Fevered Incantation
entries.desc: Each consecutive critical strike you deal increases critical strike damage you deal by 1%, up to 4% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Fire's Ire
entries.desc:
Your spell critical strike chance is increased by 2.5%.

Combustion increases your critical strike damage by 2.5%.

entries.name: Master of Flame
entries.desc:
Ignite deals 15% more damage when Combustion is not active.

Fire Blast now spreads an additional 50% of your Ignite.

entries.name: From the Ashes
entries.desc:
Fire Blast damage increased by 15%. 

Your direct damage spells reduce the cooldown of Fire Blast by 0.50 sec.

entries.name: Fiery Rush
entries.desc: While Combustion is active, Fire Blast recharges 50% faster.

entries.name: Flame Accelerant
entries.desc: The cast time of Pyroblast and Flamestrike is reduced by 20%.

entries.name: Pyromaniac
entries.desc:
Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike while Hot Streak is active has a 6% chance to repeat the spell cast at 50% effectiveness.

This effect counts as consuming Hot Streak.

entries.name: Burnout
entries.desc: When Combustion expires, all of your active Ignites explode, dealing 75% of their remaining damage.

entries.name: Feel the Burn
entries.desc: Fire Blast increases your mastery by 2% for 4 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Slow Burn
entries.desc:
Combustion grants mastery equal to 75% of your Critical Strike stat.

Combustion causes your spells to apply Ignite at 15% increased effectiveness.

entries.name: Burn It All
entries.desc: Combustion grants you 10% increased spell damage plus an additional 20% of your critical strike chance as spell damage.

entries.name: Pyroclasm
entries.desc:
Consuming Hot Streak has a 15% chance to make your next non-instant Pyroblast or Flamestrike cast within 15 sec deal 230% additional damage.

Maximum 2 stacks.

entries.name: Cinderstorm
entries.desc: Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike has a 8% chance to summon a storm of 5 cinders that pursue your target. Upon reaching your target, each cinder deals 762 Fire damage, applies Ignite at 100% effectiveness, and spreads 50% of your Ignite to up to 1 nearby target.

entries.name: Fired Up
entries.desc: Consuming Hot Streak has a 20% chance to grant you a stack of Fired Up, increasing your Fire damage by 4% for 12 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Ashes of Inspiration
entries.desc:
When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it grants you Lesser Time Warp for 6 sec.

 Lesser Time Warp
Warp the flow of time, increasing your haste by 15%.

entries.name: Burden of Power
entries.desc:
Arcane Blast damage increased by 30%.

Arcane Pulse damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Codex of the Sunstriders
entries.desc:
When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres.

Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Arcane Surge by 1% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.

entries.name: Memory of Al'ar
entries.desc:
During Arcane Surge, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade.

When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Arcane Soul for 4.0 sec.

Arcane Soul:
Arcane Barrage grants Clearcasting and generates 4 Arcane Charges.

Each cast of Arcane Barrage grants 5 stacks of Arcane Salvo and casting Arcane Barrage does not consume Arcane Salvo.

entries.name: Spellfire Spheres
entries.desc:
Casting a damaging spell has a 12% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere.

While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time.

 Spellfire Sphere
Increases your spell damage by 1.0%. Stacks up to 3 times.

entries.name: Rondurmancy
entries.desc: Spellfire Spheres can now stack up to 5 times.

entries.name: Merely a Setback
entries.desc: The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 sec after your Barrier is removed.

entries.name: Time Twist
entries.desc: The cooldown of Alter Time is reduced by 10 sec.

entries.name: Savor the Moment
entries.desc: When you cast Arcane Surge, its duration is extended by 0.4 sec for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2.0 sec.

entries.name: Sunfury Execution
entries.desc: Arcane Barrage deals 5% increased damage to enemies affected by your Touch of the Magi.

entries.name: Lessons in Debilitation
entries.desc: Your Arcane Phoenix has picked up a few tricks, and will Spellsteal when it is summoned and when it expires.

entries.name: Explosive Potential
entries.desc: After casting Arcane Surge, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing 215 Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Invocation: Arcane Phoenix
entries.desc:
When you cast Arcane Surge, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.

  Arcane Phoenix
Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Arcane Surge, casting random Arcane and Fire spells.

entries.name: Mana Cascade
entries.desc: Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Barrage grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap.

entries.name: Spellfire Salvo
entries.desc:
Arcane Salvo can stack 5 additional times.

Meteorite damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Pyrocosm
entries.desc:
Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 10% chance to summon a Meteorite.

When a Meteorite lands, you have a 5% chance to gain Clearcasting.

entries.name: Glorious Incandescence
entries.desc:
Arcane Barrage summons 1 Meteorite for every 6 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.

 Meteorite
Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing 403 Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Flash Freezeburn
entries.desc:
Meteor's damage is increased by 25%.

Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment.

entries.name: Flame and Frost
entries.desc:
Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells.

Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes when it activates.

entries.name: Dualcasting Adept
entries.desc:
Your Frost and Fire spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

Ice Lance and Pyroblast  have their damage increased by 40%.

entries.name: Isothermic Core
entries.desc:
Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing 2,557 Frost damage to nearby enemies.

Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing 3,571 Fire damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Frostfire Bolt
entries.desc: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 1,037 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 96 Frostfire damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Blast Radius
entries.desc: The damage of Meteor and Comet Storm is increased.

entries.name: Heat Sink
entries.desc: Flurry and Fire Blast now deal Frostfire damage and their damage is increased by 15%.

entries.name: Frostfire Infusion
entries.desc:
Frostfire Bolt has and additional 5% chance to grant Brain Freeze and its critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

entries.name: Thermal Conditioning
entries.desc: Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Severe Temperatures
entries.desc: Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

entries.name: Frostfire Empowerment
entries.desc:
Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing.

entries.name: Meltdown
entries.desc:
You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time.

Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

entries.name: Elemental Conduit
entries.desc:
Meteor and Pyroblast now apply Ignite.

Your Haste is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Molten Chill
entries.desc: Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite at 10% increased effectiveness.

entries.name: Duality
entries.desc: Casting Glacial Spike also casts a Pyroblast, dealing 3,495 Fire damage.

entries.name: Frostfire Bolt
entries.desc: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 1,037 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 96 Frostfire damage over 8 sec.
